name: 角与直线
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与三角 / Geometry & Trig / Geometry & Trig
curriculum_points:
The derivative of functions of the form
f(x)=axn +bxn−1+
. . .
where all exponents are integers.

Derivative of xn (n∈ℚ), sinx, cosx, e x and lnx.
Differentiation of a sum and a multiple of these
functions.
The chain rule for composite functions.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 角的概念：拖动点观察角度变化
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「角与直线」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：The derivative of functions of the form
f(x)=axn +bxn−1+
. . .
where all exponents are integers.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：Derivative of xn (n∈ℚ), sinx, cosx, e x and lnx.
Differentiation of a sum and a … 对理解「角与直线」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
